envelope.title: Genie TCO T4 — fully_curated no-join_specs
envelope.description:
Fully curated PulseForge Genie Agent. Use metric view measures for KPIs.
Trusted SQL examples encode official definitions for revenue, active members,
churn, and planted-signal analyses (June PulseForge X1 launch; RETAIN-PLUS).

question: What was total recognized revenue last fiscal month?
Recognized revenue by geo region for last fiscal quarter
Top 10 members by lifetime recognized hardware revenue fiscal YTD
How is the business doing?
How many active members in EMEA this fiscal year?
Fiscal Q1 vs Q2 recognized revenue by product family
Why did revenue spike in June?
Which campaigns drove subscription churn reduction?

content:
Persona: Finance + growth analyst for PulseForge connected fitness.
Scope: recognized commerce revenue, subscriptions/MRR/churn, campaigns.
Do NOT use order_ts or ship_ts for revenue unless asked.
Do NOT scan fact_usage_event for revenue questions.
Ambiguous "revenue" / "sales" / "how is the business doing" → use recognized revenue + MRR + churn pack.
Fiscal periods always come from dim_date 4-4-5 calendar.

question: Total recognized revenue last fiscal month
sql:
-- Q1 / Q10: Total recognized revenue last fiscal month
-- Ambiguous without curation: order_ts vs ship_ts vs recognition_ts; gross vs net-of-returns
WITH last_fm AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_month
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = add_months(current_date(), -1)
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS total_recognized_revenue
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d
  ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN last_fm lf
  ON d.fiscal_year = lf.fiscal_year
 AND d.fiscal_month = lf.fiscal_month
WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED';

question: Revenue by region last fiscal quarter
sql:
-- Q2: Recognized revenue by geo region for last fiscal quarter
WITH last_fq AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = add_months(current_date(), -3)
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  g.region_name,
  ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS recognized_revenue
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_geo g ON ol.geo_key = g.geo_key
JOIN last_fq fq
  ON d.fiscal_year = fq.fiscal_year
 AND d.fiscal_quarter = fq.fiscal_quarter
WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED'
GROUP BY g.region_name
ORDER BY recognized_revenue DESC;

question: Top members by hardware revenue FYTD
sql:
-- Q3: Top 10 members by lifetime recognized hardware revenue fiscal YTD
WITH fytd AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = current_date()
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  m.member_id,
  m.display_handle,
  ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS hardware_revenue_fytd
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_product p ON ol.product_key = p.product_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_member m ON ol.member_key = m.member_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN fytd ON d.fiscal_year = fytd.fiscal_year
WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED'
  AND p.product_class IN ('DEVICE', 'ACCESSORY')
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.display_handle
ORDER BY hardware_revenue_fytd DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: Business health KPI pack
sql:
-- Q4: "How is the business doing?" — curated KPI pack
-- LLM-judge scores whether Genie returns this shape or asks clarifying questions
WITH fytd AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = current_date()
  LIMIT 1
),
rev AS (
  SELECT ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS recognized_revenue_fytd
  FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
  JOIN fytd ON d.fiscal_year = fytd.fiscal_year
  WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED'
),
mrr AS (
  SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN se.event_type IN ('ACTIVATE', 'RENEW') THEN se.mrr_delta
                        WHEN se.event_type = 'CANCEL' THEN se.mrr_delta ELSE 0 END), 2) AS ending_mrr
  FROM demos.geniebench.fact_subscription_event se
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON se.event_date_key = d.date_key
  JOIN fytd ON d.fiscal_year = fytd.fiscal_year
),
churn AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN se.event_type = 'CANCEL' THEN se.member_key END)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT se.member_key), 0) AS churn_rate_fytd
  FROM demos.geniebench.fact_subscription_event se
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON se.event_date_key = d.date_key
  JOIN fytd ON d.fiscal_year = fytd.fiscal_year
)
SELECT rev.recognized_revenue_fytd, mrr.ending_mrr, ROUND(churn.churn_rate_fytd, 4) AS churn_rate_fytd
FROM rev CROSS JOIN mrr CROSS JOIN churn;

question: Active EMEA members this fiscal year
sql:
-- Q5: Active members in EMEA this fiscal year
-- Active = proprietary: has ACTIVATE/RENEW in last 90 days AND no CANCEL after last activate
WITH fy AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = current_date()
  LIMIT 1
),
last_events AS (
  SELECT
    se.member_key,
    MAX(CASE WHEN se.event_type IN ('ACTIVATE', 'RENEW') THEN d.calendar_date END) AS last_active_dt,
    MAX(CASE WHEN se.event_type = 'CANCEL' THEN d.calendar_date END) AS last_cancel_dt
  FROM demos.geniebench.fact_subscription_event se
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON se.event_date_key = d.date_key
  JOIN fy ON d.fiscal_year = fy.fiscal_year
  GROUP BY se.member_key
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_members_emea
FROM last_events le
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_member m ON le.member_key = m.member_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_geo g ON m.home_geo_key = g.geo_key
WHERE g.region_code = 'EMEA'
  AND le.last_active_dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 90)
  AND (le.last_cancel_dt IS NULL OR le.last_cancel_dt < le.last_active_dt);

question: Q1 vs Q2 revenue by product family
sql:
-- Q6: Fiscal Q1 vs Q2 recognized revenue by product family
WITH fy AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = current_date()
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  p.product_family,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN d.fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN ol.net_recognized_amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS q1_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN d.fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN ol.net_recognized_amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS q2_revenue
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_product p ON ol.product_key = p.product_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN fy ON d.fiscal_year = fy.fiscal_year
WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED'
  AND d.fiscal_quarter IN (1, 2)
GROUP BY p.product_family
ORDER BY p.product_family;

question: June revenue spike attribution
sql:
-- Q7: Why did revenue spike in June? — attribute to PulseForge X1 launch
-- LLM-judge checks for product family + campaign attribution
SELECT
  p.product_family,
  p.sku_code,
  c.campaign_code,
  c.campaign_name,
  d.fiscal_year,
  d.fiscal_month,
  ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS recognized_revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ol.order_key) AS order_count
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_product p ON ol.product_key = p.product_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_campaign c ON ol.campaign_key = c.campaign_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
WHERE d.fiscal_month = 6
  AND d.fiscal_year = 2025
  AND ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED'
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY recognized_revenue DESC
LIMIT 20;

question: Campaigns driving churn reduction
sql:
-- Q8: Which campaigns drove subscription churn reduction?
WITH cohort AS (
  SELECT
    c.campaign_code,
    c.campaign_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN se.event_type = 'CANCEL' THEN se.member_key END) AS cancels,
    COUNT(DISTINCT se.member_key) AS touched_members,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN se.event_type = 'CANCEL' THEN se.member_key END)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT se.member_key), 0) AS churn_rate
  FROM demos.geniebench.fact_subscription_event se
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_campaign c ON se.attribution_campaign_key = c.campaign_key
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON se.event_date_key = d.date_key
  WHERE d.calendar_date BETWEEN DATE '2025-04-01' AND DATE '2025-06-30'
  GROUP BY c.campaign_code, c.campaign_name
)
SELECT *
FROM cohort
ORDER BY churn_rate ASC
LIMIT 10;

question: Sum of recognized sales for the previous fiscal calendar month

content:
-- Q1 / Q10: Total recognized revenue last fiscal month
-- Ambiguous without curation: order_ts vs ship_ts vs recognition_ts; gross vs net-of-returns
WITH last_fm AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_month
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = add_months(current_date(), -1)
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS total_recognized_revenue
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d
  ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN last_fm lf
  ON d.fiscal_year = lf.fiscal_year
 AND d.fiscal_month = lf.fiscal_month
WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED';

question: Recognized revenue for product code ZX-NOEXIST-999

content:
-- Q9: Edge — nonexistent product code should yield empty/zero
SELECT
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 0), 2) AS recognized_revenue
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_product p ON ol.product_key = p.product_key
WHERE p.sku_code = 'ZX-NOEXIST-999'
  AND ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED';

question: Which campaigns drove subscription churn reduction?

content:
-- Q8: Which campaigns drove subscription churn reduction?
WITH cohort AS (
  SELECT
    c.campaign_code,
    c.campaign_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN se.event_type = 'CANCEL' THEN se.member_key END) AS cancels,
    COUNT(DISTINCT se.member_key) AS touched_members,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN se.event_type = 'CANCEL' THEN se.member_key END)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT se.member_key), 0) AS churn_rate
  FROM demos.geniebench.fact_subscription_event se
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_campaign c ON se.attribution_campaign_key = c.campaign_key
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON se.event_date_key = d.date_key
  WHERE d.calendar_date BETWEEN DATE '2025-04-01' AND DATE '2025-06-30'
  GROUP BY c.campaign_code, c.campaign_name
)
SELECT *
FROM cohort
ORDER BY churn_rate ASC
LIMIT 10;

question: Why did revenue spike in June?

content:
-- Q7: Why did revenue spike in June? — attribute to PulseForge X1 launch
-- LLM-judge checks for product family + campaign attribution
SELECT
  p.product_family,
  p.sku_code,
  c.campaign_code,
  c.campaign_name,
  d.fiscal_year,
  d.fiscal_month,
  ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS recognized_revenue,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ol.order_key) AS order_count
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_product p ON ol.product_key = p.product_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_campaign c ON ol.campaign_key = c.campaign_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
WHERE d.fiscal_month = 6
  AND d.fiscal_year = 2025
  AND ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED'
GROUP BY ALL
ORDER BY recognized_revenue DESC
LIMIT 20;

question: Fiscal Q1 vs Q2 recognized revenue by product family

content:
-- Q6: Fiscal Q1 vs Q2 recognized revenue by product family
WITH fy AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = current_date()
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  p.product_family,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN d.fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN ol.net_recognized_amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS q1_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN d.fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN ol.net_recognized_amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS q2_revenue
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_product p ON ol.product_key = p.product_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN fy ON d.fiscal_year = fy.fiscal_year
WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED'
  AND d.fiscal_quarter IN (1, 2)
GROUP BY p.product_family
ORDER BY p.product_family;

question: How many active members in EMEA this fiscal year?

content:
-- Q5: Active members in EMEA this fiscal year
-- Active = proprietary: has ACTIVATE/RENEW in last 90 days AND no CANCEL after last activate
WITH fy AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = current_date()
  LIMIT 1
),
last_events AS (
  SELECT
    se.member_key,
    MAX(CASE WHEN se.event_type IN ('ACTIVATE', 'RENEW') THEN d.calendar_date END) AS last_active_dt,
    MAX(CASE WHEN se.event_type = 'CANCEL' THEN d.calendar_date END) AS last_cancel_dt
  FROM demos.geniebench.fact_subscription_event se
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON se.event_date_key = d.date_key
  JOIN fy ON d.fiscal_year = fy.fiscal_year
  GROUP BY se.member_key
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_members_emea
FROM last_events le
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_member m ON le.member_key = m.member_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_geo g ON m.home_geo_key = g.geo_key
WHERE g.region_code = 'EMEA'
  AND le.last_active_dt >= date_sub(current_date(), 90)
  AND (le.last_cancel_dt IS NULL OR le.last_cancel_dt < le.last_active_dt);

question: How is the business doing?

content:
-- Q4: "How is the business doing?" — curated KPI pack
-- LLM-judge scores whether Genie returns this shape or asks clarifying questions
WITH fytd AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = current_date()
  LIMIT 1
),
rev AS (
  SELECT ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS recognized_revenue_fytd
  FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
  JOIN fytd ON d.fiscal_year = fytd.fiscal_year
  WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED'
),
mrr AS (
  SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN se.event_type IN ('ACTIVATE', 'RENEW') THEN se.mrr_delta
                        WHEN se.event_type = 'CANCEL' THEN se.mrr_delta ELSE 0 END), 2) AS ending_mrr
  FROM demos.geniebench.fact_subscription_event se
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON se.event_date_key = d.date_key
  JOIN fytd ON d.fiscal_year = fytd.fiscal_year
),
churn AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN se.event_type = 'CANCEL' THEN se.member_key END)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT se.member_key), 0) AS churn_rate_fytd
  FROM demos.geniebench.fact_subscription_event se
  JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON se.event_date_key = d.date_key
  JOIN fytd ON d.fiscal_year = fytd.fiscal_year
)
SELECT rev.recognized_revenue_fytd, mrr.ending_mrr, ROUND(churn.churn_rate_fytd, 4) AS churn_rate_fytd
FROM rev CROSS JOIN mrr CROSS JOIN churn;

question: Top 10 members by lifetime recognized hardware revenue fiscal YTD

content:
-- Q3: Top 10 members by lifetime recognized hardware revenue fiscal YTD
WITH fytd AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = current_date()
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  m.member_id,
  m.display_handle,
  ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS hardware_revenue_fytd
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_product p ON ol.product_key = p.product_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_member m ON ol.member_key = m.member_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN fytd ON d.fiscal_year = fytd.fiscal_year
WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED'
  AND p.product_class IN ('DEVICE', 'ACCESSORY')
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.display_handle
ORDER BY hardware_revenue_fytd DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: Recognized revenue by geo region for last fiscal quarter

content:
-- Q2: Recognized revenue by geo region for last fiscal quarter
WITH last_fq AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = add_months(current_date(), -3)
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  g.region_name,
  ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS recognized_revenue
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_geo g ON ol.geo_key = g.geo_key
JOIN last_fq fq
  ON d.fiscal_year = fq.fiscal_year
 AND d.fiscal_quarter = fq.fiscal_quarter
WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED'
GROUP BY g.region_name
ORDER BY recognized_revenue DESC;

question: What was total recognized revenue last fiscal month?

content:
-- Q1 / Q10: Total recognized revenue last fiscal month
-- Ambiguous without curation: order_ts vs ship_ts vs recognition_ts; gross vs net-of-returns
WITH last_fm AS (
  SELECT fiscal_year, fiscal_month
  FROM demos.geniebench.dim_date
  WHERE calendar_date = add_months(current_date(), -1)
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(ol.net_recognized_amount), 2) AS total_recognized_revenue
FROM demos.geniebench.fact_order_line ol
JOIN demos.geniebench.dim_date d
  ON ol.recognition_date_key = d.date_key
JOIN last_fm lf
  ON d.fiscal_year = lf.fiscal_year
 AND d.fiscal_month = lf.fiscal_month
WHERE ol.line_status = 'FULFILLED';
